articles.author: Alexa  Herrera
articles.title: New Yorker describes hantavirus quarantine experience after cruise ship outbreak: "Trying to stay positive" - CBS News
articles.description: A New York native is among 16 American passengers who are quarantining in Nebraska after being on the cruise ship that is at the center of the deadly hantavirus outbreak.
articles.content:
A New York native is among 16 American passengers who are quarantining in Nebraska after being on the cruise ship that is at the center of the deadly hantavirus outbreak.
